🎆 New Year's Day

A global start-of-year public holiday observed by businesses, schools, and governments in many countries.

The Lunar New Year period centered on family reunions, travel, red envelopes, and seasonal commerce.

A major Christian observance with public holidays in many countries across Europe, the Americas, Oceania, and Africa.

A major Islamic holiday connected with pilgrimage season, family gatherings, charity, and local public closures.

A family and gifting observance that creates strong retail, restaurant, travel, and content planning demand.

The festival of lights, an important religious, cultural, travel, gifting, and retail period.
